changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO category (code, parent_id, active) VALUES ('WATCH_KIDS', (SELECT id FROM category WHERE code = 'WATCH_WRIST'), true) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET parent_id = EXCLUDED.parent_id, active = true;
INSERT INTO category_i18n (category_id, lang, name) SELECT c.id, v.lang, v.name FROM category c JOIN (VALUES ('WATCH_KIDS', 'ru', 'Детские часы'), ('WATCH_KIDS', 'en', 'Kids watches'), ('WATCH_KIDS', 'kk', 'Балалар сағаттары') ) AS v(code, lang, name) ON v.code = c.code ON CONFLICT (category_id, lang) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name;
